name: Dog Parent Tax Return Tee
headline: Itemize your furry dependent.
blurb: For the dog parent who knows their pup is the best ROI they'll ever make.
story: Your dog didn't ask to be this expensive, but here we are. Vet bills, fancy kibble, that toy they destroyed in six minutes, the couch that will never be the same. This tee celebrates the beautiful chaos of pet parenthood and the fact that every single penny was worth it. Wear it with pride and maybe show it to your accountant.
recraft_prompt: Bold retro flat vector illustration of a golden retriever or mixed breed dog sitting at a desk with tiny glasses, holding a pencil, surrounded by scattered receipts, treat bags, and toy bones. Above the dog in chunky 70s-style lettering: 'TAX DEPENDENT.' Simple geometric shapes, limited color palette, no gradients, centered, isolated on a plain white background, print-ready apparel graphic

social.tt_hook: if your dog isn't your biggest expense, are you even a dog parent 🐕
social.pin_title: Dog Parent Tax Return Tee - Funny Dog Lover Shirt
social.pin_keywords: dog parent shirt, funny dog tee, dog lover gift, pet parent humor, dog mom joke
social.audience: dog parents who track treat expenses
